overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a black sports car driving through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The vehicle navigates neon-lit streets, passes monumental architecture including a giant face sculpture and glass pyramid, and approaches a large stadium structure. The scene features vibrant neon signage mixed with natural daylight and light traffic conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with elevated highways

events.description: car accelerates from stop and turns right at the intersection
passing a green truck and black sedan while driving along the avenue

agents.ego_description: driving a black sports car through the intersection and accelerating along the neon-lit avenue

notable_agents.action: green truck driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning the intersection with metal supports
large neon sign with green cursive lettering reading 'The Heavy Hearts Club'
tall glass and steel building with geometric facade patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a futuristic city intersection where the car turns right and accelerates. The elevated highway overpass dominates the center view while neon signs and palm trees line the street. The vehicle passes other traffic while driving along the multi-lane avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with monumental sculpture and pyramid

events.description: car makes a sharp right turn around the corner of a large building
exiting the covered avenue into open plaza with the giant face sculpture visible

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn around the corner while maintaining speed through the plaza

entered.detail: massive building with a detailed sculpted face facade
transparent glass pyramid structure with metal framework

segments.scene_description: The car turns right into an open plaza area, revealing the massive face sculpture building on the left and a glass pyramid in the distance. The neon signs of the previous avenue disappear as the vehicle enters a more monument-focused architectural zone with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with pyramid structure and elevated walkways

events.description: car executes a left turn to navigate around the plaza perimeter
passing the glass pyramid and approaching the stadium structure

agents.ego_description: making a left turn around the plaza while passing the giant face sculpture and approaching the pyramid

notable_agents.action: off-road vehicle driving across the plaza area

entered.detail: futuristic pedestrian bridge with curved metal supports
large circular stadium with distinctive roof structure and green accents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns left around the plaza, passing close to the glass pyramid structure. The giant face sculpture falls behind as the stadium structure comes into view in the distance. An elevated walkway spans across the scene while the car navigates toward the stadium district.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium plaza with neon signage and digital billboards

events.description: entering the covered plaza area beneath the stadium overhangs
navigating past parked vehicles near the stadium entrance

agents.ego_description: driving toward the stadium entrance through the neon-lit plaza with moderate pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: person walking on the sidewalk near the stadium entrance

entered.detail: giant screen displaying colorful advertisements on the building facade
tall cacti in concrete planters lining the walkway
neon sign reappearing on the right side as the car approaches from a different angle

segments.scene_description: The car enters the stadium plaza, driving beneath overhangs that partially cover the sky. The stadium structure dominates the center view while neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the surroundings. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the vehicle approaches the entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit city intersection into a monumental architectural plaza and finally toward a massive stadium district. It begins with the car accelerating through a multi-lane avenue beneath an elevated highway overpass, flanked by palm trees and vibrant signage. As the vehicle turns right, the dense neon environment gives way to an open plaza featuring a massive face sculpture and a distant glass pyramid under clear skies. The scene then shifts as the car maneuvers around the pyramid, leaving the sculpture behind while an elevated walkway spans the view toward a looming stadium structure. Finally, the vehicle enters the stadium plaza, driving beneath heavy overhangs and past digital billboards and pedestrians as it approaches the entrance.
